narrative:
Precinct Wayne Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 1,059 registered voters, with 61.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.3 percentage points.
